channel.title: jpcite Status
channel.description: jpcite Service Status - api / mcp / billing / data-freshness / dashboard

item.title: api degraded
item.description: api is degraded. Public category: external_dependency_unavailable.

item.title: mcp degraded
item.description: mcp is degraded. Public category: external_dependency_unavailable.

item.title: data-freshness degraded
